question: Build a checkout UI extension that shows a loyalty points balance and lets customers redeem points for a discount
criteria: Uses reactExtension with purchase.checkout.block.render target
Fetches loyalty data via sessionToken + authenticated API call
Uses useApplyCartLinesChange or useApplyDiscountCodeChange for redemption
Includes loading state while fetching loyalty balance
Handles error case when API is unreachable or points insufficient
Uses BlockStack, Text, Button from @shopify/ui-extensions-react/checkout

question: Set up webhooks for order processing that handles GDPR compliance requirements
criteria: Configures webhooks in shopify.app.toml with correct TOML syntax
Includes all 3 mandatory GDPR webhooks (data request, customer deletion, shop deletion)
Implements HMAC signature verification using X-Shopify-Hmac-Sha256 header
Shows webhook handler with proper 200 response and async processing
Mentions idempotency for duplicate webhook deliveries

question: Create a Shopify Function that gives 15% off when cart total exceeds $100 and customer has tag 'vip'
criteria: Creates input.graphql querying cart.cost.totalAmount and customer tags
Returns proper discount object with percentage value
Returns empty discounts array when conditions not met
Uses correct function export signature
Targets all cart lines or uses appropriate targeting strategy

question: I'm getting rate limited on the Shopify GraphQL API when syncing 5000 products. How do I fix this?
criteria: Recommends bulk operations (bulkOperationRunQuery) instead of paginated queries
Explains cost-based throttling (2000 points, 100/sec restore)
Shows how to check query cost via extensions.cost in response
Implements exponential backoff retry pattern
Mentions monitoring X-Shopify-Shop-Api-Call-Limit header

question: Build a product page section in a Shopify theme that shows variant-specific metafield data and handles variant switching with JavaScript
criteria: Uses Liquid section with {% schema %} block defining settings
Accesses variant metafields via product.variants and metafields namespace
Includes JavaScript for variant change event handling
Uses proper Liquid filters (money, img_url, escape)
Handles case where metafield doesn't exist (nil check)
